reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención... Los playeros siempre bien predispuestos. El Automóvil Club Argentino siempre da un bien servicio. Se puede pagar con tarjeta de débito y crédito. Acceso muy sencillo. Sobre la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service... The attendants are always helpful. The Automóvil Club Argentino consistently provides good service. Payment accepted by debit and credit cards. Very easy access. Right on the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncExpMm9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio. Atienden muy bien. Hay un gran espacio verde para descansar. Con hamacas, calesita y cerca de un Corral de animales. Siempre que pasamos bajamos un rato a estirar las piernas con nuestros perros.

(Translated by Google)
Good gas station. Excellent service. There's a large green space to relax in, with hammocks, a carousel, and a nearby animal enclosure. Whenever we pass by, we stop for a while to stretch our legs with our dogs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOHNXZEl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños son deplorables falta de higiene total, el kiosko no tiene NADA. Parece un lugar olvidado en el tiempo

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are deplorable, completely unhygienic, and the kiosk has absolutely nothing. It seems like a place forgotten by time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJOHFTUXhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Por donde empiezo una hamburguess que parece sacada del decierto de lo SECA qur esta la Lechuga no tenia hongos porque nose pero estaba podrida la panceta chiclosa incomible el queso de fetas Y UN JAMON EN LA HAMBURGUESA decepcionable nunca volveria y no es nada compaeable 170 jq solamente estafs total foto para demostrsr que deje todo ahi

(Translated by Google)
Where do I even begin? A hamburger that looks like it came from the desert, it's so DRY. The lettuce didn't have mold, I don't know why, but it was rotten. The bacon was chewy and inedible. The feta cheese AND THE HAM IN THE BURGER were disappointing. I would never go back. It's not even comparable. 170 soles. I'm just taking a picture to show I left everything there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJZ3RPNm9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar , para quedarse cuando se está viajando y no se quiere entrar a la ciudad de Bahía Blanca, muy cómodo,con expendio de combustibles, confitería, restaurante y hotelería , con cocheras individuales , muy bien atendido y ubicado en la circunvalación camino de Sesquicentenario, se puede reservar viajando y te reciben aunque no seas socio del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to stay when traveling and you don't want to go into the city of Bahía Blanca. Very comfortable, with a gas station, confectionery, restaurant and hotel, with individual parking spaces, very well attended and located on the ring road towards Sesquicentenario. You can make a reservation while traveling and they will welcome you even if you are not an ACA member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJODdyaFZ3EAE
